title: Segfault on DELETE with WHERE containing OR
poc: CREATE TABLE t1(x INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, y TEXT);
DELETE FROM t1 WHERE x IS NULL OR x<2;

SELECT statement below does a full table scan:
CREATE TABLE t2(x INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, y TEXT);
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE x IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE t1(x INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, y TEXT);
DELETE FROM t1 WHERE abs(x)=99 OR abs(x)<2;
key_bug_features: DELETE with OR in the WHERE clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3(a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, b TEXT, c REAL);
INSERT INTO t3(a, b, c) VALUES(1, 'lion', 3.14);
DELETE FROM t3 WHERE b IS NULL OR c < 4.0;
CREATE TABLE t4(d INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, e TEXT);
